code_modifications.reason: SHM-related OBJ_GC variables declared without #ifdef SHM_BUILD_ENABLED guard in hcom_obj_statistics.h/cpp, causing undeclared variable errors when SHM is enabled
epoll_event incomplete type within ock::hcom namespace - struct tag name lookup fails because epoll_event is defined via typedef in sys/epoll.h, not as a struct tag

code_modifications.modified: inline void DestroyCallback(const Callback *cb) { delete cb; }
code_modifications.reason: DestroyCallback used in service_channel_imp.cpp for error-path cleanup but never defined for Callback class (only existed for MultiCastCallback in multicast_publisher.h)
service_imp.cpp:1812 references driverOpt.activateBackup but member doesn't exist in UBSHcomNetDriverOptions struct
NetDriverSockWithOOB is only forward-declared in net_sock_common.h but its members are accessed in inline functions in this header
Same as net_sock_async_endpoint.h - NetDriverSockWithOOB incomplete type

documentation_gaps: README.md does not document the need to run install_test_tools.sh before building with tests
README.md does not document the TEST_TOOL_INSTALL_PATH cmake variable required when BUILD_TESTS=ON
hcom.spec lists BuildRequires for umdk-urma-devel which is not available in standard openEuler repos
Source code has multiple compilation errors that prevent clean build without modifications
LLT (Hcomtest) test target has separate compilation issues not documented

problems_encountered.problem: SHM-related OBJ_GC variables undeclared when SHM_BUILD_ENABLED is defined
problems_encountered.solution: Commented out ENABLE_OBJ_GLOBAL_STATISTICS in CMakeLists.txt line 162
problems_encountered.cause: hcom_obj_statistics.h declares SHM variables without #ifdef SHM_BUILD_ENABLED guard
struct epoll_event tag lookup fails within ock::hcom namespace because epoll_event is a typedef, not a struct tag

problems_encountered.problem: DestroyCallback not declared for Callback class
problems_encountered.solution: Added inline DestroyCallback function to hcom_service_channel.h
problems_encountered.cause: Function only defined for MultiCastCallback in multicast_publisher.h, not for Callback in hcom_service_channel.h

problems_encountered.solution: Added 'bool activateBackup = false;' to UBSHcomNetDriverOptions struct
problems_encountered.cause: service_imp.cpp references a member that was added to HcomServiceImpOptions but not to UBSHcomNetDriverOptions

problems_encountered.problem: NetDriverSockWithOOB incomplete type in endpoint headers
problems_encountered.cause: Headers use members of NetDriverSockWithOOB but only include net_sock_common.h which has forward declaration

problems_encountered.solution: Not fixed - this is a test-only issue; hcom_ut target builds and runs successfully
problems_encountered.cause: net_rb_tree.h uses NN_UNLIKELY macro before it's defined in hcom_def.h

problems_encountered.problem: Docker DNS resolution failure on ECS
problems_encountered.solution: Abandoned Docker approach, ran verification directly on host
problems_encountered.cause: Container networking DNS configuration issue on ECS machine
